rulings.Case Title: JEFFERSON CHRISMAN VS. HOWARD LEE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 12, 2018, Line 3. CROSS DEFENDANT CAROLYN CHRISMAN'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT. SUSTAINED. Demurrer to Causes of Action One through Seven are sustained with leave to amend to allege sufficient facts to show that Carolyn Chrisman was obligated under the Guarantee of Rental Agreement after the Jefferson Chrisman's new lease was signed in 2014. The Eighth Cause of Action is sustained without leave to amend. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JEFFERSON CHRISMAN VS. HOWARD LEE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 12, 2018, Line 3. CROSS DEFENDANT JEFFERSON CHRISMAN'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT. Jefferson Chrisman's Demurrer to Eighth Cause of Action to the First Amend Cross Complaint is SUSTAINED without leave to amend. =(501/REQ)
